site.title: SPICYBEAN — Golf Headcovers with Attitude
site.description: Korean design-driven golf headcovers. Born for those who play with style.

hero.subtitle: Korean design. Studio craftsmanship. A statement on every tee.

series.title: The Collection
series.subtitle: Four series, one signature attitude. Every headcover tells a story.

k1.name: K1 — Noir Luxe
k1.desc: Black pebble-grain leather finish. Understated elegance for the minimalist.

k2.name: K2 — White Heart
k2.desc: Crisp white with embroidered heart motif. Playful, bold, unmistakable.

k3.name: K3 — Red Heat
k3.desc: Full-overprint red pattern. For those who refuse to blend in.

k4.name: K4 — Neon Noir
k4.desc: Cyberpunk-inspired signature edition. Our flagship icon.

about.title: Born in Seoul. Made to Stand Out.
about.p1: SPICYBEAN was born from a simple observation at a driving range in Seoul — the players who turned heads weren't always the best golfers. They were the ones with style.
about.p2: Every SPICYBEAN headcover is designed in collaboration with DBWD, a Red Dot Award-winning studio in Korea. Over 60,000 double-layer embroidery stitches go into every piece. The result? A headcover that doesn't just protect your club — it introduces you before you swing.

material.title: Premium PU Leather
material.desc: Water-resistant, durable, easy to clean. Built for real rounds.

stitch.title: 60,000+ Stitches
stitch.desc: Double-layer embroidery with precision that rivals haute couture.

design.title: Red Dot Award DNA
design.desc: Designed by DBWD, Korea's award-winning design studio.

fit.title: Universal Fit
fit.desc: Compatible with driver, fairway wood, hybrid, and blade putter.

contact.title: Get in Touch
contact.subtitle: Questions, wholesale inquiries, or just want to say hi?

footer.designed: Designed in Seoul. Made with love.
